diffs.before:
#!/bin/bash

# Fully automatic daily work commit
# Usage: git auto (no arguments needed)

# Get current date and time
DATE=$(date +"%Y-%m-%d")
TIME=$(date +"%H:%M:%S")
TIMESTAMP="$DATE $TIME"

# Create daily work log directory
mkdir -p .git/daily-logs

# Analyze what changed
CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain)
if [ -z "$CHANGES" ]; then
    echo "✅ No changes to commit - everything is up to date!"
    exit 0
fi

# Auto-generate description based on changes
DESCRIPTION="Auto-commit"

# Count different types of changes
MODIFIED=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep "^ M " | wc -l)
ADDED=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep "^?? " | wc -l)
DELETED=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep "^ D " | wc -l)
RENAMED=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep "^R " | wc -l)

# Build smart description
if [ $MODIFIED -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION - updated $MODIFIED file(s)"
fi
if [ $ADDED -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION - added $ADDED file(s)"
fi
if [ $DELETED -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION - deleted $DELETED file(s)"
fi
if [ $RENAMED -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION - renamed $RENAMED file(s)"
fi

# Add file types to description
PYTHON_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.py$" | wc -l)
JS_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$" | wc -l)
HTML_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.(html|htm)$" | wc -l)
CSS_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.(css|scss|sass)$" | wc -l)
MD_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.md$" | wc -l)

if [ $PYTHON_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (Python: $PYTHON_FILES)"
fi
if [ $JS_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (JS/TS: $JS_FILES)"
fi
if [ $HTML_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (HTML: $HTML_FILES)"
fi
if [ $CSS_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (CSS: $CSS_FILES)"
fi
if [ $MD_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (Docs: $MD_FILES)"
fi

# Create today's work log entry
LOG_FILE=".git/daily-logs/$DATE.md"

cat >> "$LOG_FILE" << EOF

## Auto-Commit Session - $TIME
**Description**: $DESCRIPTION
**Files Changed**:
$(echo "$CHANGES" | sed 's/^/ - /')

**Summary**: Total files changed: $(echo "$CHANGES" | wc -l)

---

EOF

# Add all changes
git add .

# Commit with auto-generated message
COMMIT_MSG="[$DATE] $DESCRIPTION"

git commit -m "$COMMIT_MSG"

# Push if remote exists
if git remote get-url origin &>/dev/null; then
    git push origin $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
    echo "✅ Auto-commit completed and pushed to remote!"
else
    echo "✅ Auto-commit completed locally!"
fi

# Show summary
echo ""
echo "🤖 Auto-Commit Summary:"
echo "📅 Date: $DATE"
echo "⏰ Time: $TIME"
echo "📝 Auto-generated: $DESCRIPTION"
echo "📁 Log file: $LOG_FILE"
echo "📊 Files changed: $(echo "$CHANGES" | wc -l)"

#!/bin/bash

# Fully automatic daily work commit
# Usage: git auto (no arguments needed)

# Get current date and time
DATE=$(date +"%Y-%m-%d")
TIME=$(date +"%H:%M:%S")
TIMESTAMP="$DATE $TIME"

# Create daily work log directory
mkdir -p .git/daily-logs

# Analyze what changed
CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain)
if [ -z "$CHANGES" ]; then
    echo "✅ No changes to commit - everything is up to date!"
    exit 0
fi

# Auto-generate description based on changes
DESCRIPTION="Auto-commit"

# Count different types of changes
MODIFIED=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep "^ M " | wc -l)
ADDED=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep "^?? " | wc -l)
DELETED=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep "^ D " | wc -l)
RENAMED=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep "^R " | wc -l)

# Build smart description
if [ $MODIFIED -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION - updated $MODIFIED file(s)"
fi
if [ $ADDED -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION - added $ADDED file(s)"
fi
if [ $DELETED -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION - deleted $DELETED file(s)"
fi
if [ $RENAMED -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION - renamed $RENAMED file(s)"
fi

# Add file types to description
PYTHON_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.py$" | wc -l)
JS_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$" | wc -l)
HTML_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.(html|htm)$" | wc -l)
CSS_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.(css|scss|sass)$" | wc -l)
MD_FILES=$(echo "$CHANGES" | grep -E "\.md$" | wc -l)

if [ $PYTHON_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (Python: $PYTHON_FILES)"
fi
if [ $JS_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (JS/TS: $JS_FILES)"
fi
if [ $HTML_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (HTML: $HTML_FILES)"
fi
if [ $CSS_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (CSS: $CSS_FILES)"
fi
if [ $MD_FILES -gt 0 ]; then
    DESCRIPTION="$DESCRIPTION (Docs: $MD_FILES)"
fi

# Create today's work log entry
LOG_FILE=".git/daily-logs/$DATE.md"

cat >> "$LOG_FILE" << EOF

## Auto-Commit Session - $TIME
**Description**: $DESCRIPTION
**Files Changed**:
$(echo "$CHANGES" | sed 's/^/ - /')

**Summary**: Total files changed: $(echo "$CHANGES" | wc -l)

---

EOF

# Add only project files (exclude system directories)
git add *.md *.txt *.py *.js *.html *.css *.json *.sh *.png *.jpg *.gif *.yml *.yaml 2>/dev/null || true
git add backend/ frontend/ src/ app/ components/ lib/ utils/ docs/ training/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Commit with auto-generated message
COMMIT_MSG="[$DATE] $DESCRIPTION"

git commit -m "$COMMIT_MSG"

# Push if remote exists
if git remote get-url origin &>/dev/null; then
    git push origin $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
    echo "✅ Auto-commit completed and pushed to remote!"
else
    echo "✅ Auto-commit completed locally!"
fi

# Show summary
echo ""
echo "🤖 Auto-Commit Summary:"
echo "📅 Date: $DATE"
echo "⏰ Time: $TIME"
echo "📝 Auto-generated: $DESCRIPTION"
echo "📁 Log file: $LOG_FILE"
echo "📊 Files changed: $(echo "$CHANGES" | wc -l)"
